nasb.text: His mouth is full of sweetness. And he is wholly desirable. This is my beloved and this is my friend, O daughters of Jerusalem.”

esv.text: His mouth is most sweet, and he is altogether desirable. This is my beloved and this is my friend, O daughters of Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 他的口甜蜜； 他全然可愛。 耶路撒冷的眾女子啊！ 這就是我的良人，我的朋友。

ccb.text: 他的嘴甘甜如蜜， 整个人都令人爱慕。 耶路撒冷的少女啊， 这就是我的良人， 我的朋友。
